cities.name: Manila
cities.notes: Intramuros walled city, Rizal Park and chaotic street food culture

cities.name: Palawan
cities.notes: El Nido lagoons, Puerto Princesa underground river and Coron shipwrecks

cities.name: Cebu
cities.notes: Magellan's Cross, whale shark swimming in Oslob and Chocolate Hills day trip

cities.name: Boracay
cities.notes: White Beach sunset walks, parasailing and Willy's Rock

cities.name: Siargao
cities.notes: Cloud 9 surf break, Sugba Lagoon and island-hopping with rock pools

cities.name: Bohol
cities.notes: Chocolate Hills, Philippine tarsier sanctuary and Loboc River cruise
